settings.question: What's included in the free design layout?
settings.answer: A to-scale CAD floor plan showing furniture placement for your space — based on your dimensions or a site visit. We use the same layout tools our commercial install teams work from.

settings.question: Is there a minimum project size?
settings.answer: No minimum. The service is free for any project, whether you're fitting out two workstations or a full floor.

settings.question: How long does it take?
settings.answer: We typically deliver a first draft within 3–5 business days of receiving your project details.

settings.question: Do I have to buy the furniture from you?
settings.answer: No obligation. The floor plan is yours either way. Most clients do order from us once they see the layout — but that's your decision.

settings.question: Do you do space planning outside Ontario?
settings.answer: We work on spaces across Canada. Delivery and installation are Ontario-based — we'll be upfront about that during the design conversation.

settings.hero_heading: A free CAD floor plan for your office — no obligation.
settings.hero_standfirst: Brant Business Interiors is an OECM Supplier Partner (Agreement 2025-470) and Canadian-owned office furniture dealer serving Ontario businesses. Our free design layout service delivers a to-scale CAD floor plan with furniture placement — at no cost and with no obligation to purchase. Call 1-800-835-9565 to talk it through first.
settings.intro_heading: We deliver the floor plan. You decide what to do with it.
settings.intro_para1: Send us your room dimensions and project scope. Our Ontario-based team builds a to-scale CAD floor plan with every desk, chair, and storage unit placed where it actually fits. Same format our commercial install crews work from — not a rough sketch.
settings.intro_para2: The floor plan is yours, free, whether you order from us or not. Most clients do place an order once they see the layout — but that decision is yours, not ours.
settings.diff_heading: Everything in the free design layout.
settings.testimonial_quote: Sharing a successful partnership for more than a decade. A great local company that provides products and services with a smile.
settings.faq_heading: Five questions before you fill out the form.
settings.closer_heading: Prefer to talk it through first?
settings.closer_sub: Our team is on the phone Monday to Friday. Floor plan, square footage, or just a rough idea — any starting point works.
